name: Grilled Marinated Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tofu and cut it lengthwise into halves.
2. In a bowl, combine all remaining ingredients.
3. Place the tofu halves in a 1-inch-deep platter and drizzle with the marinade until well coated.
4. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
5. Grill the tofu for about 5-7 minutes on each side until browned.
6. Alternatively, heat a teaspoon of oil in a non-stick pan or griddle over medium-high heat. Place the tofu halves in the pan and cook for about 4 minutes on each side until browned.
